channel.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Introduction to JAX by Kevin Murphy - Colab that introduces various aspects of the language and applies them to simple ML problems.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • exojaxstars11 - Automatic differentiable spectrum modeling of exoplanets/brown dwarfs compatible to JAX.
  • CR.Sparsestars3 - XLA accelerated algorithms for sparse representations and compressive sensing.
  • flaxmodelsstars28 - Pretrained models for Jax/Flax.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Writing an MCMC sampler in JAX by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on the different ways to write an MCMC sampler in JAX along with speed benchmarks.
  • How to add a progress bar to JAX scans and loops by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on how to add a progress bar to compiled loops in JAX using the host_callback module.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • jaxliestars61 - Lie theory library for rigid body transformations and optimization.
  • BRAXstars167 - Differentiable physics engine to simulate environments along with learning algorithms to train agents for these environments.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • delta PVstars5 - A photovoltaic simulator with automatic differentation.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • Coaxstars29 - Turn RL papers into code, the easy way.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

  • JAX (Flax) RLstars154 - Implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • TensorLystars1k - Tensor learning made simple.
  • Distraxstars179 - Reimplementation of TensorFlow Probability, containing probability distributions and bijectors.
  • cvxpylayersstars964 - Construct differentiable convex optimization layers.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Optimal Transport Toolsstars145 - Toolbox that bundles utilities to solve optimal transport problems.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

  • Distributed Shampoo - Implementation of Second Order Optimization Made Practical.
  • Flax Models - Collection of models and methods implemented in Flax.

    • Libraries

  • RLaxstars591 - Library for implementing reinforcement learning agents.

    • Libraries

    New Libraries

  • FlaxVisionstars11 - Flax version of TorchVision.
  • Oryx - Probabilistic programming language based on program transformations.

    • Videos

  • Solving y=mx+b with Jax on a TPU Pod slice - Mat Kelcey - A four part YouTube tutorial series with Colab notebooks that starts with Jax fundamentals and moves up to training with a data parallel approach on a v3-32 TPU Pod slice.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Evolved channel selection by Mat Kelcey - Trains a classification model robust to different combinations of input channels at different resolutions, then uses a genetic algorithm to decide the best combination for a particular loss.
  • Deterministic ADVI in JAX by Martin Ingram - Walk through of implementing automatic differentiation variational inference (ADVI) easily and cleanly with JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • imaxstars9 - Image augmentations and transformations.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

  • Normalizer-Free Networks - Official Haiku implementation of NFNets.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Exploring hyperparameter meta-loss landscapes with JAX by Luke Metz - Demonstrates how to use JAX to perform inner-loss optimization with SGD and Momentum, outer-loss optimization with gradients, and outer-loss optimization using evolutionary strategies.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Evolving Neural Networks in JAX by Robert Tjarko Lange - Explores how JAX can power the next generation of scalable neuroevolution algorithms.
  • Out of distribution (OOD) detection by Mat Kelcey - Implements different methods for OOD detection.
  • Extending JAX with custom C++ and CUDA code by Dan Foreman-Mackeystars111 - Tutorial demonstrating the infrastructure required to provide custom ops in JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • NumPyrostars986 - Probabilistic programming based on the Pyro library.
  • Chexstars241 - Utilities to write and test reliable JAX code.
  • Optaxstars341 - Gradient processing and optimization library.
  • JAX, M.D.stars451 - Accelerated, differential molecular dynamics.
  • SymJAXstars90 - Symbolic CPU/GPU/TPU programming.

    • Libraries

    New Libraries

  • jax-unirepstars68 - Library implementing the UniRep model for protein machine learning applications.
  • jax-cosmostars55 - Differentiable cosmology library.

    • Models and Projects

  • Performer - Flax implementation of the Performer (linear transformer via FAVOR+) architecture.
  • Reformer - Implementation of the Reformer (efficient transformer) architecture.

    • Videos

  • Introduction to JAX - Simple neural network from scratch in JAX.

    • Papers

  • Compiling machine learning programs via high-level tracing. Roy Frostig, Matthew James Johnson, Chris Leary. MLSys 2018. - White paper describing an early version of JAX, detailing how computation is traced and compiled.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Plugging Into JAX by Nick Doiron - Compares Flax, Haiku, and Objax on the Kaggle flower classification challenge.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

  • Vision Transformerstars2.5k - Official implementation in Flax of An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.
  • Fourier Feature Networksstars557 - Official implementation of Fourier Features Let Networks Learn High Frequency Functions in Low Dimensional Domains.
  • JaxNeRF - Implementation of NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis with multi-device GPU/TPU support.
  • Big Transfer (BiT)stars1.2k - Implementation of Big Transfer (BiT): General Visual Representation Learning.

    • Videos

  • NeurIPS 2020: JAX Ecosystem Meetup - JAX, its use at DeepMind, and discussion between engineers, scientists, and JAX core team.
  • JAX: Accelerated Machine Learning Research | SciPy 2020 | VanderPlas - JAX's core design, how it's powering new research, and how you can start using it.
  • Bayesian Programming with JAX + NumPyro — Andy Kitchen - Introduction to Bayesian modelling using NumPyro.
  • JAX on Cloud TPUs | NeurIPS 2020 | Skye Wanderman-Milne and James Bradbury - Presentation of TPU host access with demo.
  • Deep Implicit Layers - Neural ODEs, Deep Equilibirum Models, and Beyond | NeurIPS 2020 - Tutorial created by Zico Kolter, David Duvenaud, and Matt Johnson with Colab notebooks avaliable in Deep Implicit Layers.

    • Papers

  • JAX, M.D.: A Framework for Differentiable Physics. Samuel S. Schoenholz, Ekin D. Cubuk. NeurIPS 2020. - Introduces JAX, M.D., a differentiable physics library which includes simulation environments, interaction potentials, neural networks, and more.
  • Enabling Fast Differentially Private SGD via Just-in-Time Compilation and Vectorization. Pranav Subramani, Nicholas Vadivelu, Gautam Kamath. arXiv 2020. - Uses JAX's JIT and VMAP to achieve faster differentially private than existing libraries.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Using JAX to accelerate our research by David Budden and Matteo Hessel - Describes the state of JAX and the JAX ecosystem at DeepMind.
  • Getting started with JAX (MLPs, CNNs & RNNs) by Robert Lange - Neural network building blocks from scratch with the basic JAX operators.
  • Tutorial: image classification with JAX and Flax Linen by 8bitmp3stars4 - Learn how to create a simple convolutional network with the Linen API by Flax and train it to recognize handwritten digits.
  • Meta-Learning in 50 Lines of JAX by Eric Jang - Introduction to both JAX and Meta-Learning.
  • Normalizing Flows in 100 Lines of JAX by Eric Jang - Concise implementation of RealNVP.
  • Differentiable Path Tracing on the GPU/TPU by Eric Jang - Tutorial on implementing path tracing.
  • Ensemble networks by Mat Kelcey - Ensemble nets are a method of representing an ensemble of models as one single logical model.
  • Understanding Autodiff with JAX by Srihari Radhakrishna - Understand how autodiff works using JAX.
  • From PyTorch to JAX: towards neural net frameworks that purify stateful code by Sabrina J. Mielke - Showcases how to go from a PyTorch-like style of coding to a more Functional-style of coding.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • mpi4jaxstars62 - Combine MPI operations with your Jax code on CPUs and GPUs.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

  • mcxstars294 - Express & compile probabilistic programs for performant inference.

    • Libraries

    New Libraries

  • Neural Network Libraries
    • FedJAXstars39 - Federated learning in JAX, built on Optax and Haiku.
    • Equivariant MLPstars104 - Construct equivariant neural network layers.
    • jax-resnetstars32 - Implementations and checkpoints for ResNet variants in Flax.
  • efaxstars7 - Exponential Families in JAX.
  • jax-flowsstars142 - Normalizing flows in JAX.
  • sklearn-jax-kernelsstars25 - scikit-learn kernel matrices using JAX.

    • Models and Projects

  • jaxnsstars33 - Nested sampling in JAX.
  • kalman-jaxstars72 - Approximate inference for Markov (i.e., temporal) Gaussian processes using iterated Kalman filtering and smoothing.
  • GPJaxstars18 - Gaussian processes in JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Models and Projects

  • NuXstars48 - Normalizing flows with JAX.

    • Videos

  • JAX: Accelerated machine-learning research via composable function transformations in Python | NeurIPS 2019 | Skye Wanderman-Milne - JAX intro presentation in Program Transformations for Machine Learning workshop.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

  • Neural Network Libraries
    • Flaxstars1.7k - Centered on flexibility and clarity.
    • Haikustars1.1k - Focused on simplicity, created by the authors of Sonnet at DeepMind.
    • Objaxstars593 - Has an object oriented design similar to PyTorch.
    • Elegy - A framework-agnostic Trainer interface for the Jax ecosystem. Supports Flax, Haiku, and Optax.
    • Traxstars6.1k - "Batteries included" deep learning library focused on providing solutions for common workloads.
    • Jraphstars589 - Lightweight graph neural network library.
    • Neural Tangentsstars1.4k - High-level API for specifying neural networks of both finite and infinite width.
    • HuggingFacestars45.7k - Ecosystem of pretrained Transformers for a wide range of natural language tasks (Flax).

    • Community

  • JAX GitHub Discussions
  • Reddit
